summary: Preserve Paperclip's composed authentication, credential boundaries, retry safety, MCP transport parity, tail failures, and bounded recall I/O across regeneration.
reason: The generated package discarded all declared security schemes, exposed local-file and token-bearing inputs through MCP or diagnostics, retried mutations, hid single-poll failures, and performed one resource lookup per recall candidate.
validated_outcome: Focused package tests cover each repaired behavior; full repository validation is recorded on the pull request.
